data.body: Investigated (debug-everything 2026-04-28): Design approach: add a 'code_version' field to the bug report template capturing the git SHA at filing time. In debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode, before dispatching fix-bug for each ticket, check whether the bug's code_version is an ancestor of HEAD via 'git merge-base --is-ancestor'. If not, add a skip comment and continue. Changes needed: (1) create-bug/SKILL.md (add code_version to template), (2) shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md (add field definition), (3) debug-everything/SKILL.md Bug-Fix Mode (add ancestry check). Leaving open for dedicated sprint.
